channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy acquires another 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million
item.description: The latest purchase was made at an average price of $63,024 per bitcoin.

item.title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran Breakthrough though Middle East risks, Fed remain in focus
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 15, 2026

item.title: Philippines Issues Stricter Crypto Listing Rules, Bans Privacy Coins
item.description: The Philippines' central bank has tightened crypto oversight with new rules governing how exchanges assess and monitor digital assets.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal lifts equities, sends oil lower, while crypto stays wary
item.description: The peace deal reached over the weekend provided the stimulus many markets had been waiting for. Crypto traders, however, have learned to distrust this particular headline

item.title: Bitcoin Tops $65K on US-Iran Deal, But Traders Remain Skeptical
item.description: A crypto relief rally has “partially arrived” as Trump announces a deal with Iran, but prediction market traders remain unconvinced.

item.title: Middle East ceasefire, Fed interest-rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 15.

item.title: Can BTC rebound to $69K as oil price plunges? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin gained bullish short-term BTC price targets with $69,000 on the radar thanks to the US-Iran peace deal, due to be signed in the coming days.

item.title: Japan’s Bitbank cracks down on Polymarket-linked transfers
item.description: Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank warns users of possible account suspensions for Polymarket-linked transactions, citing Japan’s gambling laws.

item.title: KuCoin (@kucoincom) / Posts / X - x.com
item.description: KuCoin (@kucoincom) / Posts / X x.com

item.title: Trump-linked stablecoin used for bonus payouts at White House UFC contest
item.description: UFC Freedom 250 paid fighter bonuses in USD1, the stablecoin issued by the Trump-linked crypto venture World Liberty Financial, at a contest held at the White House.

item.title: Ark Invest bought more than $500 million worth of SpaceX shares on IPO day
item.description: The purchases were likely funded by selling other positions, data shows. ARK is also one of the loudest bitcoin bulls, with a million-dollar target for 2030.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $66K as Trump says US has peace deal with Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US and Iran have a deal for a “toll-free opening of the Strait of Hormuz,” sending Bitcoin to a two-week high.

item.title: Bitcoin traders have a reason to watch Tuesday's BOJ rate decision. Yen shorts are at a nine-year high
item.description: A large build-up of speculative short positions in the yen raises the risk of a sharp short squeeze if the BOJ signals more aggressive tightening, potentially unwinding yen-funded carry trades that support risk assets.

item.title: CFTC sues New Mexico over prediction market jurisdiction
item.description: New Mexico is the eighth state sued by the CFTC over prediction markets, as Gary Gensler doubted the regulators' claim of authority over sports event contracts.

item.title: Aztec Connect’s abandoned smart contract exploited for $2.1M
item.description: The Aztec Connect platform was deprecated in March 2023, but the immutable smart contract still held over $2 million in crypto assets.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin jumps above $66,000 as short squeeze builds on US-Iran deal hopes
item.description: A ceasefire in April collapsed, and U.S. strikes broke a second truce on June 9 with bitcoin giving back the entire move both times.

item.title: EU's MiCA Deadline Could Wipe Out Thousands Of Crypto Firms The EU's MiCA transition period ends on July 1, leaving unlicensed crypto firms facing potential exclusion from the market, per CryptoSlate. Only 194 firms had secured MiCA licenses as of May - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE56bFRqdElnTW5JMFB0ZmJtNzlHZW1RMm81Tk5aeUlzVlJ2YWY2MWY3dkU2Q09Kem1tVkY5SUdnczRDRloxQ1poUWFVeG5mWm1McThRMTBxRXNYazJ2?oc=5" target="_blank">EU's MiCA Deadline Could Wipe Out Thousand…

item.title: XRP climbs 4% above $1.18 as traders test next resistance zone
item.description: XRP extended its rebound from recent lows on the strongest buying activity in weeks, with institutional flows and ETF demand supporting a push toward the $1.20 level.

item.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in 11th largest downward adjustment
item.description: Bitcoin mining difficulty has undergone its second-largest downward difficulty adjustment this year, following February’s 11% shift.

item.title: Bitcoin hits a two-week high above $65,500 as the US-Iran deal sends oil sliding
item.description: A peace agreement that reopens the Strait of Hormuz pulled the geopolitical premium out of oil and put back into risk assets.

item.title: MiCA Transition Ends on July 1: Approximately 75% of EU Crypto Companies May Lose License The EU’s MiCA transition period will end on July 1, after which crypto exchanges, brokers and wallet service providers without a MiCA license will no longer be ab - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1TSTNSTkFyRXhCR2pOQ0VvcXFFZHJ1WEVFZW5Fd1lGSTVOTVhyZHd6VS05VkpjSWdOTEFlMUNmdHBXcHRaZEt2S2xhV1R6UVlWSThObkJTYXFocWN2SHhmdU9YOA?oc=5" target="_blank">MiCA Transition Ends on July 1: …

item.title: I’m as bullish as ever on Bitcoin, and still long (as always). It’s never as good or bad as it seems. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE8zSDBRemQ1ZDc1VzdnTjlpQ21CWS1sUkhmb0pLMTl4TGxWVmNUbk1yV0dKN2U2Z04wWloxV19oeEZTaGRaNzBPUjU0YVNwOUowSmlkZHM0M3Q2U3ZNZzRMNDdQLU0xM1k?oc=5" target="_blank">I’m as bullish as ever on B…

item.title: Bitcoin shoots higher on Iran peace deal, with Strait of Hormuz set to open
item.description: The price of crude oil is tumbling, and U.S. stock futures are moving higher.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: $150,000,000 worth of shorts liquidated from the crypto market following US-Iran peace agreement. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9hdlAzc25tRVZ3WVI1d3BOVnM0M3VVMHRtd3ptdmZqNE1haERJTW9NRDZYa0xMaFFxVmlYQkhpOEJUc0oxd0ptdS1GcmRNQmJYeUVmNmJyR1dBMHJkenJiTDhB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $150,000,000 worth of sho…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin reclaims $65,000 after US announces peace deal with Iran. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1QSTJDSFFsaXltdU5pNVFnRWtMU1dFZXpBNzM3WmZIWFZWMlkxenlvTTJ3SmJvdXhjWE53d1lpTDRuX3IyZno0R18zTmRIb1hCT1FmZ016aUZLS1puSmpmRjdR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin reclaims…

item.title: Bitcoin could crash to $48,000, if this historical pattern is triggered
item.description: A pattern stretching back to bitcoin's earliest days has held through every market cycle. It has yet to be tested in the current one.

item.title: Reve 2.0 Review: The Best AI Image Generator for Layout Control
item.description: The startup that beat Midjourney at a penny per image is back with a 4K model that plans pictures like code—and refuses far less than its rivals

item.title: StanChart looks for 3 signs of BTC bottom, including Strategy’s Monday news
item.description: Standard Chartered’s Geoff Kendrick tells clients “winter is over” as the analyst said crypto prices have likely seen the low for the cycle, ahead of Strategy’s Bitcoin purchase update.

item.title: Summer of crypto (regs): State of Crypto
item.description: Lawmakers are debating taxes, the CFTC put out a prediction market proposal and court cases are heating up.

item.title: Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet
item.description: The concept, called Predictive Allocation, will encourage participants to anticipate where liquidity will be needed next, instead of rewarding them for directing incentives toward pools that have already generated fees.

item.title: SEC's big swing to clear tokenization path isn't likely to get resilience of full rule
item.description: Former SEC lawyers say that using its power to grant tokenization "innovation" efforts an exemption from securities law isn't as strong as a full-fledged rule.

item.title: Ethereum can quantum-proof accounts for just 7 cents, says Ethereum's Kohaku lead
item.description: The SPHINCS- proposal aims to reduce the cost of post-quantum signature verification on Ethereum while the network works toward a longer-term solution.

item.title: Pokémon Card Sales Are Surging on Crypto Platforms—Just Don't Call It Gambling
item.description: Tokenized Pokémon card sales have skyrocketed over the past year, fueled by a wave of speculation and so-called gacha machines.

item.title: Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other as tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6 billion
item.description: Not all crypto exchange executives agree, but the data does not lie: centralized exchange trading volumes dropped more than 11% to $4.61 trillion, their lowest since late 2024.

item.title: 🚨 BITCOIN MINING DIFFICULTY FALLS 10.09% - SECOND-LARGEST DROP OF 2026 At block 953,568, Bitcoin’s mining difficulty adjusted downward by 10.09%, marking the second-largest decline of the year. The move follows Bitcoin’s roughly 15% price c - x.com

item.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M loss tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
item.description: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
item.description: Bitcoin stayed near local highs on a new US-Iran peace deal pledge as analysis saw conditions favoring a sustained BTC price rebound.

item.title: BPS measures Bitcoin per common share before senior claims. CEBE BPS measures Bitcoin per common share after senior claims. CEBE is the conservative risk metric. BPS is the common equity growth metric. BTC Yield measures BPS execution. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9ERFh6WXhhSllMS2FWVFVKWHN5SWVrZ25HUE1LU29sOWlfbjdUTnZCN0lLckFKTUhVRVZmelg3cnJRZlo0U3hrbWc5Ym41YmtzbkFCOW9NRXNhejg?oc=5" target="_blank">BPS measures Bitcoin per common share befor…

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: The SEC approved T. Rowe Price’s multi-asset crypto ETF, which could include BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, SHIB and up to 15 digital assets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBVNVdiNC1vZVNCLWs5MkhmNHVsSi00ZGZONnRTbURIdEJheUJqRHkydml2c0FxVlZpenlNaFUwenZvUWhoVURwaXhXdGZxQTFNd202UjB1ZHpHTXl4cGdkSkxvZFU?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: The SEC approved T. …

item.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
item.description: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.

item.title: Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models: Reports
item.description: Calls from Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and other tech firms prompted the Trump administration to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models on Friday.

item.title: Michael Saylor: Investors Have Lost Confidence in Ethereum On June 12, 2026, at the Bitcoin Corporate Day event, Michael Saylor @saylor discussed Bitcoin's rising market dominance. He stated that, excluding stablecoins, Bitcoin's dominance in the crypto - x.com

item.title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models
item.description: Anthropic pushed back against what it described as an overreach, saying the vulnerability cited is already widespread across the industry.

item.title: Crypto’s next billion-dollar hacker may move at superhuman speed
item.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Fable 5 puts powerful cyber tools behind safety filters. DeFi, already hit by more than $840 million in hacks this year, is one of the industries with the most to lose if the filters fail.

item.title: Here's what SpaceX's IPO means for its $1.3 billion bitcoin reserve
item.description: The largest company on public markets now holds bitcoin as a treasury reserve, not as a business model. Its first earnings cycles will test which version of corporate crypto survives a bear market.

item.title: CZ: "Will crypto die? Absolutely not... the super cycle will come." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5FMklCaG53QWlwZ0k2dElYMWxSd2E0dkcyS1kzdmo4c0NRVDJDSWlPVUxMeGhkcTg1Z2N3dmdQODBwbk5uOU5lbzMxTnpJemc4VWFOSXYtN1RMMXNGckE?oc=5" target="_blank">CZ: "Will crypto die? Absolutely not...…

item.title: Stablecoins Were Meant to Disrupt Finance. Instead, They Became Idle Cash.
item.description: O’Connor argues that crypto’s clearest success story has scaled as money but not as capital.

item.title: Unlike many investors in crypto, I did not pivot to AI in the last few years. However, since 2020, I built some of the deepest understanding in this industry on the intersection of AI and decentralized networks (crypto, web3). From the start, it was very clear that AI - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin rises above $64,000 after Pakistan prime minister says Iran peace deal is near
item.description: Bitcoin traded above $64,000 on Saturday, supported by its strongest ETF inflows in a month and growing optimism around geopolitical developments.

item.title: Google Sues Chinese Crime Group for Allegedly Using Gemini AI for Mass Phishing Scams
item.description: Google alleges a Chinese network weaponized its Gemini AI to create phishing sites that stole millions of credit card numbers and targeted crypto investors.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Drops 9.55%, Second-Largest Decline This Year According to TheEnergyMag, Bitcoin mining difficulty is expected to fall by approximately 9.55% in about eight hours, marking the second-largest decline this year, following a sharp drop - x.com

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
item.description: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further “serious bugs” in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows are accelerating: US Bitcoin ETFs have posted -$2.1 billion in outflows so far in June, on pace to exceed -$2.4 billion in outflows recorded in May. This has been driven by the largest spot Bitcoin ETF, $IBIT, which saw -$401.4 million in outf - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
item.description: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's “never sell” mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

item.title: Ethereum can already start preparing accounts for a post quantum world, without waiting for a hard fork. Today, it would be just 0.07$ . Further audits incoming. Though I squeezed in a review with Fable before Uncle Sam crashed my party. Verity formal proof i - x.com

item.title: AI Agent Rekts Dev on Bogus Scan, Leaves Them Begging for Crypto Donations
item.description: A hobbyist network handed an autonomous agent a masterclass in why you don't give AI a credit card and a deadline.

item.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
item.description: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.

item.title: This is a phenomenal area to be building a position into #Bitcoin. I think that we'll see some news coming in from the markets that there's a deal between US Iran and Bitcoin breaking back in the range above $65,000. That would trigger a lot of strength to the a - x.com
